generated_oml:
// Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensorRaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi mounted environmental sensor for temperature measurement in the indoor air quality study."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RPiTempDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensorRaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi mounted environmental sensor for humidity measurement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RPiHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2SensorRaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi mounted environmental sensor for CO₂ measurement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RPiCO2DataTransmitted
]

instance ParticulateMatterSensorRaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi mounted environmental sensor for particulate matter measurement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RPiPMDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionSensorCrane : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Kinematic sensor on gantry crane measuring its linear rail position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePosDataTransmitted
]

instance VelocitySensorCrane : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Kinematic sensor on gantry crane measuring its rail velocity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneVelDataTransmitted
]

instance ForceSensorCrane : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Force sensor on gantry crane measuring load forces."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneForceDataTransmitted
]

// Data Transmitted (MQTT over Azure IoT Hub)
instance RPiTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorRaspberryPi
]

instance RPiHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensorRaspberryPi
]

instance RPiCO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2SensorRaspberryPi
]

instance RPiPMDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ParticulateMatterSensorRaspberryPi
]

instance CranePosDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensorCrane
]

instance CraneVelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VelocitySensorCrane
]

instance CraneForceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ForceSensorCrane
]

// Data (time‐series values)
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements collected from Raspberry Pi sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RPiTempDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureIoTHubIngress
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Humidity measurements collected from Raspberry Pi sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RPiHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureIoTHubIngress
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "CO₂ measurements collected from Raspberry Pi sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RPiCO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureIoTHubIngress
]

instance PMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Particulate matter measurements collected from Raspberry Pi sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RPiPMDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureIoTHubIngress
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cranial position measurements from linear rail sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePosDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryPlanningEnabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cranial velocity measurements from linear rail sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneVelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryPlanningEnabler
]

instance ForceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cranial force measurements from force sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneForceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance AzureIoTHubIngress : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Azure IoT Hub ingesting MQTT messages from Raspberry Pi environmental sensors."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityAnalysisService
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Trajectory planner engine using real‑time position and velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryPlanningService
]

instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Continuous validation enabler comparing simulated crane states against live sensor measurements."
    DTDFVocab:enables ValidationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine runner for AutomationML models of crane motion."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService
]

instance PredictionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Azure Machine Learning model for indoor air quality and virus spread risk prediction."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService
]

instance TimescaleDBLogging : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB logging service for crane telemetry engineered via Python Logging Application."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneTelemetryService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web-based Azure powered dashboard for visualization and interaction."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

// Services
instance AirQualityAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service processing environmental sensor data to provide real‑time indoor air quality monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides IndoorAirQualityInsight, MonitorAllSensorsAction
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing optimal trajectory planning for the crane."
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlanningInsight, ControlGuidanceInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously validating the crane kinematic model against live sensor measurements."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service running kinematic simulations of the gantry crane based on AutomationML model."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneSimulationInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering predictions of indoor air quality and virus spread risk using Azure Machine Learning."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityPredictionInsight, VirusSpreadRiskInsight
]

instance CraneTelemetryService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service logging crane telemetry and providing insights into position, velocity, and force."
    DTDFVocab:provides CranePositionInsight, CraneVelocityInsight, CraneForceInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Web dashboard providing real‑time visualization of crane telemetry and indoor air quality, and allowing operator interactions."
    DTDFVocab:provides ReSimulationAction, AdjustVentilationAction, RecordDecisionAction
]

// Models
instance AutomationMLGantryCraneModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML model describing the kinematic structure and dynamics of the lab‑scale gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance AutomationMLAirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML model representing indoor air quality simulation scenarios for the laboratory environment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictionEnabler
]

// Insights
instance IndoorAirQualityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time insight into indoor temperature, CO₂, humidity, and particulate matter levels."
]

instance VirusSpreadRiskInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction insight on virus spread risk based on indoor air quality data."
]

instance CranePositionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time insight into the linear rail position of the gantry crane."
]

instance CraneVelocityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time insight into the linear rail velocity of the gantry crane."
]

instance CraneForceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time insight into the force being exerted by the gantry crane."
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing optimal trajectory planning for the crane operation."
]

instance ControlGuidanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time control guidance insight for the crane operators."
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating validation status of the crane kinematic model against live measurements."
]

instance CraneSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from kinematic simulation of the gantry crane."
]

instance AirQualityPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insight on future indoor air quality conditions."
]

// Actions
instance ReSimulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator action to trigger re‑simulation of the indoor air quality scenarios via the dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustVentilationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator action to adjust ventilation settings in the laboratory environment via the dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RecordDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator action to record control decisions for audit and refinement."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MonitorAllSensorsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to monitor all environmental sensors in real time."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application sends motion directives through the same Python Crane Interface to the crane’s controllers. The interface transforms the high‑level trajectory commands into controller‑specific messages, dispatching them over the same connection to the physical system, and the updated crane state is subsequently returned and logged."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "GreenhouseDT implements a federated digital twin architecture where real‑time greenhouse sensor streams are collected via InfluxDB and published through an ActiveMQ message broker to a set of virtual machine‑hosted services. Each service (data ingestion, simulation, adaptive control) runs inside its own container and is orchestrated with Docker Compose, providing isolated yet coordinated execution. Resource management is handled at the VM level, with the broker mediating synchronization between the physical greenhouse actuators and the digital twin logic. The architecture also incorporates Microsoft Azure for cloud‑based analytics, demonstrating a hybrid edge‑cloud deployment pattern."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "All Digital Twin services communicate via an MQTT broker that serves as the event bus between the Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, and other components. The broker enables decoupled, asynchronous message passing within the local lab network."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is realized through several protocols and standards: sensor data from the physical greenhouse is transmitted to the ActiveMQ broker using a proprietary lightweight publish/subscribe model; the digital twin interfaces with Microsoft Azure services (e.g., Azure IoT Hub, Azure Machine Learning) via REST and AMQP protocols; AutomationML serves as the semantic modeling language for the Air Quality Management exemplar, enabling interoperability with other engineering tools and systems; all external communication is designed to be extensible, allowing additional enterprise systems such as SCADA or ERP to be connected through standard APIs or message queues."
]
